title: A specific set of Neon Genesis Evangelion subs
display_title: A specific set of Neon Genesis Evangelion subs
wikitext:
[]: A specific set of Neon Genesis Evangelion subs             Quote Post by whd877 » Wed Mar 20, 2024 12:02 am Hello. I haven't used a forum in quite some time, it's nostalgic. Anyway, I've been rewatching NGE on kissanime ru to prepare for tomorrow's End of Evangelion American screening. I really enjoy the translation on offer here, [link redacted] but some episodes (10, 15, 16, and now 24) are unavailable. You can head over to nyaa and download some BD release, but I much prefer these subtitles on this kissanime release. It's a very negligible preference; the subtitles convey the same meaning: Eva Unit 04, which was being built in America,

[]: Re: A specific set of Neon Genesis Evangelion subs             Quote Post by pwhodges » Wed Mar 20, 2024 4:17 am I think those are the zx subs. There are still zx dls available. Paul

[]: Re: A specific set of Neon Genesis Evangelion subs             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Wed Mar 20, 2024 7:51 am IIRC Kissanime was using Central Anime, yes. Which is a very old fansub and full of problems. Nowadays you should always give preference to Khara's own sub, and after that ADV Platinum. http://cassland.org/misc/Scripts&Subs.zip
